meta.title: StreetCart KC
meta.subtitle: Streetcar-led food access pilot for Kansas City
meta.tagline: One public spine. Four operating hubs. Sixty days to prove it.

thesis: StreetCart KC uses the Kansas City streetcar corridor as the public-facing food-access spine, while partner hubs move food into priority ZIP codes and a verified volunteer bracket keeps the 60-day pilot visible.

problemProof.label: Federal supply shock
problemProof.detail: Harvesters shortfall this quarter after a 40% TEFAP reduction.

problemProof.label: Resident need
problemProof.detail: Kansas Citians are food insecure at a 10-year high.

problemProof.label: Pantry gap
problemProof.detail: Challenge API returned zero pantry results for ZIP 64130 despite high need.

priorityZips.reason: Price Chopper closure, highest local service gap, strong case for recurring hub coverage.
Save-A-Lot closure and strong bilingual outreach need.
Highest poverty and strong Spanish-language access requirement.
Strong transit and partner-assisted feeder case from KCK.
Food desert designation and low vehicle access.

hubs.name: River Market Exchange Hub
hubs.purpose: Produce sorting, volunteer staging, northbound public pickup.

hubs.name: Union Station Civic Hub
hubs.purpose: Visible city-facing pickup hub tied to civic foot traffic.

hubs.name: Guadalupe Family Hub
hubs.purpose: Bilingual family access point and feeder hub for east-side pickup.

hubs.name: Cross-Lines Connector Hub
hubs.purpose: Partner-operated feeder hub extending beyond the corridor without changing the streetcar-led story.

budget.detail: Field staffing, partner stipends, food handling, SMS, volunteer ops.
Operator dashboard, resident messaging flow, leaderboard, data integration.
Bilingual outreach, community liaisons, volunteer recruitment, event support.
Impact reporting, city-ready scorecards, sponsorship packaging, wrap mock production.
Curveball reserve, scale-up cash, contract extension bridge.

kpis.label: Unique households reached
kpis.detail: Priority ZIP households served during the 60-day pilot.

kpis.label: Completed service events
kpis.detail: Verified pickups and deliveries across all hubs.

kpis.label: Food moved
kpis.detail: Bundles and perishables moved before spoilage.

kpis.label: Volunteer teams activated
kpis.detail: Schools, churches, fan groups, and employers in the bracket.

renewalCase: 70%+ of volume delivered into the five target ZIP codes
85%+ resident completion rate after SMS or partner outreach
A public proof loop that city council can stand in front of and fund again

residentExample.name: Familia Ramirez
residentExample.instructionTitle: Su próxima recogida de StreetCart KC
residentExample.instructionBody: Miércoles · 11:00 AM a 2:00 PM · Cross-Lines Connector Hub. Lleve una bolsa reutilizable. No se requiere identificación. El Centro tendrá apoyo en español en el sitio.
residentExample.fallback: Si no puede llegar, responda AYUDA para solicitar entrega prioritaria.

aiProcess: Challenge API evaluation narrowed the product inputs to harvest, pantries, supply alerts, and demographics.
Concept iteration pressure-tested streetcar vs. bus and locked the streetcar as the civic spine with bus as phase-two reach.
Deck, Muse brief, and thin live site were kept on one fact base so judges can inspect the same pilot three different ways.

curveballModule.title: Curveball-ready operating lever
curveballModule.body: StreetCart KC can reassign one hub slot to produce-bag distribution or community vote support without changing the core experience.
